{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032112032943B0CD47E69018398995"}"},"total":2494},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7427097516171477784","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"嗯，很好看，我反正很少看到日常文，而且还是这种，我非常感兴趣的这种，男主设定终于不是那种千篇一律的很帅的那种了，要是真的男主很帅的话，那我都不想看了，因为日常，然后还是很帅的话，都看多了其实，现在这个看着是真的很好看，我反正现在都是在等着这个更新，然后这个，就是这个书的封面也是让人挺印象深刻的，基本上看一眼就记住了，作者你这写的很好，加油。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1729260089,"group_id":"7389296532085804057","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"嗯，比较喜欢怪兽反派文，反正喜欢的角色是帝皇，还有海帕杰顿。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nzum4SHFcLayIQJi9KViF66NMZjYVoE0ssZgv/sR5mcY","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/cffca3e463d5487abbeb520d88bac2f6~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776614715&x-signature=b6P5BZM9raSoOK2p3mkGhKAFb18%3D","user_id":"3887492341971032","user_name":"无敌传奇海帕杰顿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3887492341971032","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1696665548,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7389296532085804057","book_info":{"abstract":"（综漫+文抄公+慢节奏日常，春物、路人、孤独摇滚、看得见、迦希大人，无法一起学习······）
穿越成一个肥宅该怎么办？
田中正雄十分而绝望，自己穿越了，名字、家庭是个路人也就算了，不给他张帅脸普通的也行啊。
但是为什么成了象是从动漫里走出的标准肥宅？
不过还好有个系统，可这系统
······
雪之下雪乃：“跟田中菌待在一起，还真是令人不适呢。”
英梨梨：“你这个满脑子都是黄色废料的家伙，赶快给我想新的本子剧情！”
霞之丘诗羽：“我是想不到，写出这种甜蜜小说的人居然是你，肥宅君。”
四谷见子：“田中，帮帮我，只要消灭恶灵，让我……”
藤原千花：“田中学弟还真是可爱呢。”
后藤一里：“田中，最好的朋友。”

:0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":18,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":6874,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":33434},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7433125818507313945","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"番茄屎堆里掏出来的真正金子，作者对于每个角色的人设把控都还不错，对于日常的节奏写法和把控也很到位。
没有那种一上来就主角各种无敌，而是写出了我心中想看的综漫温馨日常，和各种女主的相遇也不那么的突兀，写的很合理，这一点真的大大的加分。
还有就是看了这么久才想起来评分。
以及最后想说的：作者，你这个年纪是怎么睡得着的？你是怎么睡得着觉的！？
你踏马的快点儿起来给我更新啊！我要看新章节，我要看新章节！
再不看的话，真感觉浑身有蚂蚁在爬啊啊啊啊！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1730677445,"group_id":"7389296532085804057","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一条超喜欢码字的咸鱼","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8zVaYWJKveChMPLzm5BH3J7nvwUDC1d8H0IskDh12EJ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e3ec3d29fe3347fb966eb838ac5649ec~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623107&x-signature=A9W2T4RxW%2BwTISBUiYxRj4Haa%2Bc%3D","user_id":"3649986920196151","user_name":"三花啦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3649986920196151","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1775969170,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47aabaca7b644a2b0eb9d35477c6d9df"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"},{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id ":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":31,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":15859,"reply_count":8,"show_pv":50103},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1730683568,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7459454742201959193","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错的日常综漫。
在番茄这个群遍地龙傲天火葬场的地方淘到这个乐子（金子）。
有梗有日常。
这个时候系统的存在也是可有可无了，顶多算是推剧情的钥匙。（除了画本子一系列的时候）
男主刻意到发自本能的下头（很难怀疑不是在在内涵我们冰清玉洁[思考]），也算是乐子，勉强能接受。
由于男主的起点为负数，所以主角的改变极易得到正反馈。
男主感觉比隔壁白天帝下限更低一些，毕竟一个是从零开始一个是满级出厂。
好在有系统和本子作为降神来加快成长和推剧情。
大家喜欢瑟瑟。","text_exts":[{"e":23,"s":20,"text":"火葬场","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%81%AB%E8%91%AC%E5%9C%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177406580918398995%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227459454742201959193%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227389296532085804057%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%81%AB%E8%91%AC%E5%9C%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1736804607,"group_id":"7389296532085804057","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxMy0zABdP0IEfj0/4kTh/zTcYDlrjKnqxulFUnhOIIs","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1d67d46b86ce4d6ab4031fe1e6a7a59d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776617054&x-signature=ImGE8Hk1zet0KXAjnTuq6MR8bIs%3D","user_id":"2949309643101236","user_name":"初出茅房斑"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2949309643101236","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7389296532085804057","book_info":{"abstract":"（综漫+文抄公+慢节奏日常，春物、路人、孤独摇滚、看得见、迦希大人，无法一起学习······）
